title: EB on the latest, CC has update - no update buttons
scenario: Companion App firmware update buttons missing from Home and Settings screens when earbud is already on latest version
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app on Android.
2. Pair a Poly Bluetooth earbud (EB) that is already on the latest firmware version.
3. Ensure the Companion App (CC) itself has a firmware update available (e.g., via Play Store or in-app update mechanism).
4. Observe the Home screen for any update buttons or prompts.
5. Navigate to the Settings screen (e.g., tap the gear icon or menu).
6. Observe the Settings screen for any update buttons or prompts.
8. Repeat steps 4–6 on the 3rd, 5th, 10th, 13th, and 15th app restart.
9. On each restart, check for the CC update dialog/toaster appearing.
expected: The CC update dialog/toaster should appear on first pairing and on subsequent app restarts (3rd, 5th, 10th, 13th, 15th, etc.), and update buttons should be displayed on the Home and/or Settings screens.
